Task: Write a formal letter or a detailed email to your instructor describing a specific workspace or study area where you spend most of your time.
In your writing, ensure you cover the following points:
Location & Setup: Where is this space located (e.g., a corner of a room, a library, or a home office), and how is it organized?
Design & Atmosphere: Describe the furniture, lighting, and any specific tools or technology you use. What is the "vibe" of the room (e.g., minimalist, cluttered but cozy, modern)?
The Surrounding Environment: What can you see or hear from this spot? Is it a quiet sanctuary or in the middle of a busy area?
Personal Significance: Explain why this specific environment helps you stay productive or inspired. Mention one particular object in this space that is meaningful to you.

Dear Ms.Azarin ,

I hope you are doing well . I am your student Tamkin Waziri , I want to share the details of our new study area , it is the best my study place that I can have till now, it is located in the biggest city in pakistan, in karachi and it is located in the middle of city, garden jamatkhana, in front of the dua salon.
The study area that we studying has the best furniture, it has largest ECD, it has modern AC , it has the moderns board and markers . actually when I go to the class I get trhe modern vibe .
If I want to say about surrounding enviroment , there is very quit and relax to study , there is the some glayly jar to get sounds in and that is why there can be quit and a good place to study .
If I want to say totally about it ,my study area is a quiet corner of my room where I can focus without distractions. The environment helps me stay productive because it is organized, comfortable, and familiar. Having everything I need within reach allows me to concentrate on my tasks and manage my time efficiently. The calm atmosphere also helps me think clearly and stay motivated when working on assignments or personal projects.
One object in this space that is especially meaningful to me is my notebook. I use it to write down ideas, goals, and reminders. It represents my progress and creativity because many of my plans and thoughts begin on those pages. Whenever I look through it, I feel encouraged to keep learning, improving, and turning my ideas into reality.
When I check my study suitution , I believe to reach for my goals and in future I will make the best life for me and for my family. 
I look forward to hearing from you as well. 

Best wishes 
Tamkin Waziri
